layout.footer.address: Centur Building, 1st of November Blvd. 407, Punta Cana 23000
layout.footer.disclaimer: This site provides general information and does not replace an in-person medical evaluation.
layout.footer.hoursWeekdays: Monday to Friday from 8:00 a.m. to 5:30 p.m.
layout.footer.mainDescription: Professional and close pediatric care for every stage of childhood.
main.advisory.emergencyNow: Go to pediatric emergency care immediately.
main.advisory.priority24h: Priority pediatric consultation within the next 24 hours.
